mapper.sql: ppla.leave_approval_id, ppla.permission_id, ppla.stop_date, ppla.enabled_flag, ppla.id, ppla.create_time, ppla.create_by, ppla.update_time, ppla.update_by

${tAlias}.leave_approval_id as ${tAlias}_leave_approval_id, ${tAlias}.permission_id as ${tAlias}_permission_id, ${tAlias}.stop_date as ${tAlias}_stop_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from pm_permission_leave_approval ppla join pm_it_permissions pip on ppla.permission_id = pip.id
mapper.insert: insert into pm_permission_leave_approval (leave_approval_id, permission_id, stop_date, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{leaveApprovalId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{permissionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{stopDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
